questions: Have you stocked out of any products this week that possibly resulted in lost sales?
Are there any products you urgently need that require an emergency transfer?
Are there any products that frequently run low and may require a threshold adjustment?
Are there any products that frequently remain overstocked and might need lower thresholds?
Have you noticed any shifts in customer preferences lately?
Was the Inventory Shipment well organized this week?

items.parent: "The Springer" Limited Edition: White with Navy Accents - Classic Fit

scmRemarks.q1-0: Athletic Fit Stretch Blazer - Black – 42: Available at warehouse — we will arrange a transfer shortly.
scmRemarks.q2-0: "The Springer" Solid White – Medium: Available at warehouse — we will arrange a transfer shortly.
scmRemarks.q3-0: Dress Shoe - Black – 10: Threshold adjustment from 1 → 3 noted. We will review and update accordingly.
scmRemarks.q4-0: "The Springer" Limited Edition: White with Navy Accents - Classic Fit – 40: Lowering threshold from 2 → 1. No further replenishment until levels normalize.
scmRemarks.q5-0: Customer preference noted: They like Grey — will share with buying team.
scmRemarks.q6-0: Sorry to hear the shipment was disorganized — we will flag this with logistics.
